name: Form Scaffold
tagline: Generate formal scaffolds for 8 form types
description: Creates section-by-section formal scaffolds for Sonata, Rondo, Theme & Variations, Ternary/Minuet & Trio, Binary, Fugue, Concerto, and Song Form. Includes historical presets (Classical/Romantic), section properties, rehearsal marks, staff text, and form map output.

versionHistory.notes: Added Song Form type and improved Fugue scaffolding
